home.title: Zeka Stack
home.subtitle: Intelligent Plugin Ecosystem
home.description: A powerful set of IntelliJ IDEA plugins to boost your development productivity
home.heroDescription: A modern enterprise-grade scaffolding based on Spring Boot 3. Adhering to 'Convention over Configuration', providing out-of-the-box components to help teams rapidly build high-quality microservice systems with extreme efficiency.
home.coreArchitectureDesc: Zeka Stack is organized into a layered architecture, ensuring strict dependency flow and modularity.
home.toolboxDescription: Zeka Plugin is more than just AI. It contains all kinds of practical tools for backend development, seamlessly integrated in your IDE.
home.aiAgentDescription: Beyond simple auto-completion. Zeka Agent can understand your natural language instructions, analyze the entire project codebase, autonomously plan and execute complex modification tasks. From bug fixes to feature migration, all in one go.
home.ctaTitle: Ready to Boost Your Development Efficiency?
home.ctaDescription: Join thousands of developers using Zeka Stack and experience a smarter, smoother coding workflow.

engine.title: Intelli AI Engine
engine.description: Context-aware intelligent code completion, natural language code generation, unit test generation, and code explanation. Let AI be your pair programming partner.

javadoc.title: Javadoc Generator
javadoc.description: Generate standard Java documentation comments with one click. Supports custom templates, automatically parses method signatures, parameters, and return values, keeping docs in sync with code.

swagger.title: Swagger Manager
swagger.description: Browse, search, and test Swagger/OpenAPI interfaces directly in your IDE. Supports interface documentation preview and mock data generation.

nacos.title: Nacos Config
nacos.description: Manage Nacos configurations without leaving your editor. Supports multi-environment switching, configuration version comparison, and quick modification and publishing.

tracer.title: Trace Analysis
tracer.description: Integrated distributed tracing analysis to quickly locate performance bottlenecks and exception nodes in microservice call chains.

devHelper.title: Dev Helper
devHelper.description: Built-in collection of common development tools: JSON formatting, Base64 encoding/decoding, timestamp conversion, regex testing, and more.

agent.title: AI Agent
agent.description: Autonomous task planning, execute complex refactoring

codeUnderstanding.title: Code Understanding
codeUnderstanding.description: Deep analysis of project structure and dependencies

whyZeka.title: Why Choose Zeka Stack?
whyZeka.desc: Building microservices shouldn't mean re-inventing the wheel every time. Zeka Stack provides a consistent, opinionated, and battle-tested foundation for your enterprise applications.

standards.title: Unified Engineering Standards
standards.desc: Strict Maven parent hierarchy (Arco) eliminates dependency conflicts (DLL Hell) and enforces coding standards.

cloud.title: Box-to-Cloud Ready
cloud.desc: From local scaffolding (Cubo) to middleware orchestration (Eiko), everything is pre-configured for cloud-native deployment.

ai.title: AI-Enhanced Development
ai.desc: Deep integration with Zeka IDEA Plugin for AI-driven coding, documentation, and debugging.

performance.title: High Performance
performance.desc: Optimized kernel and lightweight wrappers ensure minimal overhead.

security.title: Enterprise Security
security.desc: Built-in authentication (Blen Auth) and secure defaults.

developer.title: Developer First
developer.desc: Extensive tooling, clear docs, and intelligent IDE support.

modular.title: Modular Design
modular.desc: Strict layering. Use what you need, replace what you don't.

integration.title: Complete the Experience
integration.desc: Zeka Stack is designed to work seamlessly with the Zeka IDEA Plugin. Generate code, manage dependencies, and visualize your architecture directly from your IDE.

footer.tagline: Engine powers every AI plugin · Build beyond limits

settings.subtitle: Your GitHub Binding Information

featureRequests.title: Feature Requests
featureRequests.description: Vote on existing requests or submit your own ideas to help us improve.

privacyPolicy.title: Privacy Policy & Disclaimer
privacyPolicy.subtitle: How Zeka Engine Plugin Collects, Uses, and Protects Your Information

section1.title: 1. Information We Collect
section1.description: To provide better coding assistance services and continuously optimize product experience, the Zeka Engine plugin may collect the following types of information:

codeContext.title: A. Code Snippets & Context (Temporary Processing Only)
codeContext.description: For code completion, analysis, generation, and refactoring, we need to temporarily read code snippets from your currently active file in the editor and related context (such as cursor position, selected content).
codeContext.note: Note: These data are only used for real-time processing and will be immediately discarded from memory after processing. They will not be persistently stored on our servers.

usageStats.title: B. Usage Statistics (Anonymized)
usageStats.description: We only collect anonymous statistics related to plugin functionality for performance and feature experience optimization, including the following types of information:
usageStats.featureUsage: Feature Usage: Event types (such as Javadoc/Commit Message/Changelog, etc.) and usage frequency.
usageStats.performanceMetrics: Performance Metrics: Single request duration, success/failure status.
usageStats.modelInfo: Model Information: AI service provider and model name (name only, no credentials).
usageStats.entryPoints: Trigger Entry: Entry point types such as project tree/editor/shortcut key/commit panel/Git log panel.
usageStats.timeDimensions: Time & Dimensions: Event time, project name (only for statistical dimension, does not include code).
usageStats.anonymousDevice: Anonymous Device Identifier: Locally generated anonymous identifier, only used for statistics deduplication and cross-device consistency.
usageStats.noCredentials: We do not collect or store your API Key, Access Token, Secret, or any credentials.

notCollect.title: C. Information We Explicitly Do Not Collect
notCollect.noApiKeys: User's API Key, keys, Token, passwords, or any sensitive credentials
notCollect.noCodeContent: Code file content, project source code, commit diffs, or file paths
notCollect.noOtherData: Any data not described in this privacy policy
notCollect.statement: We will not collect any data beyond what is described in this section.

section2.title: 2. Use of Information
section2.description: The data we collect is only used for statistics page data display and aggregation analysis, not for advertising, user profiling, or any personalized marketing.
section2.usage1: Display feature usage and event type distribution
section2.usage3: Display model and provider usage proportions
section2.usage4: Display entry source distribution and trend changes

section3.title: 3. Data Protection & Security
section3.description: We take your data security very seriously.
section3.encryptedTransmission: Encrypted Transmission: All data transmission uses HTTPS/TLS encryption protocol.
section3.localFirst: Local Processing First: We run logic locally as much as possible. For features that must rely on cloud AI, we only send the minimum necessary context.
section3.sensitiveStorage: Sensitive Information Storage: Your API keys and other sensitive credentials are stored in the IDE's local secure storage (IntelliJ Password Safe), we cannot directly read them, nor will we upload them.
section3.noCodeStorage: No Code Retention: Unless you explicitly participate in a specific data contribution program, we will absolutely not persistently store any of your business code on our servers.

section4.title: 4. Third-Party Services
section4.description: This plugin integrates multiple third-party Large Language Model (LLM) service providers (such as OpenAI, Aliyun Qianwen, Anthropic, etc.) to provide AI capabilities. When you configure and use these services, your request data (including code snippets) will be sent directly to the corresponding service providers. The processing of these data will comply with the privacy policies of each third-party service provider. We strongly recommend that you review the privacy terms of relevant service providers before use. We will try our best to screen for compliant and privacy-conscious partners, but make no final guarantees.

aiAccuracy.title: A. Accuracy of AI-Generated Content
aiAccuracy.description: Content generated by AI models (including code, comments, documentation, etc.) is based on probability prediction and may contain errors, omissions, or inaccuracies. Users must manually review and test the generated content before use. Developers assume no liability for bugs, security vulnerabilities, data loss, or business losses resulting from direct use of AI-generated code.

asIsSoftware.title: B. Software Provided "As Is"
asIsSoftware.description: This plugin is provided on an "as is" and "as available" basis, without any warranties of any kind, whether express or implied, including but not limited to merchantability, fitness for a particular purpose, and non-infringement.

securityRisks.title: C. Data Security Risks
securityRisks.description: While we have taken reasonable security measures, Internet transmission cannot be guaranteed 100% secure. We assume no legal liability for data leakage or loss caused by force majeure, hacker attacks, system viruses, improper user configuration, or third-party service vulnerabilities.

donate.feedbackThanks: Thank you for your support, we will review it soon.

changelog.title: Changelog
changelog.description: View historical version updates for IntelliAI plugins

arco.title: Arco Meta
arco.subtitle: The Foundation: Build Infrastructure & Engineering
arco.description: Arco Meta (L0) serves as the absolute build infrastructure for the Zeka Stack. It solves the "DLL Hell" of Maven dependencies by strictly managing versions and configurations at the root level. Every project in the stack inherits from Arco, ensuring a unified engineering standard.

supreme.title: Arco Supreme
supreme.desc: The global root parent project. Unifies build configurations, dependency versions, code styles, and plugin management for the entire ecosystem.

builder.title: Arco Builder
builder.desc: A layered Maven parent structure designed for both library modules and business applications, ensuring build consistency.

processor.title: Arco Processor
processor.desc: Annotation processor for compile-time generation of Spring Boot configurations (spring.factories) and SPI files.

plugin.title: Arco Maven Plugin
plugin.desc: Custom Maven plugins for build automation, including "90-second automation" tasks and quality checks.

blen.title: Blen Kernel
blen.subtitle: The Core Kernel: Utilities & Standards
blen.description: Blen Kernel (L1) provides the foundational Java libraries and utilities used by every other layer. It encapsulates common logic for Authentication, Web responses, Validation, and Distributed Tracing, ensuring that developers don't reinvent the wheel for basic capabilities.

common.title: blen-kernel-common
common.desc: Universal utilities, base models, exceptions, and return structures.

web.title: blen-kernel-web
web.desc: Web layer encapsulation: Exception handling, Response wrapping, Interceptors.

validation.title: blen-kernel-validation
validation.desc: Enhanced validation annotations and error processing.

tracer.title: blen-kernel-tracer
tracer.desc: Distributed tracing context and log correlation.

test.title: blen-kernel-test
test.desc: Testing support, base test classes, and integration test helpers.

cubo.title: Cubo Starter
cubo.subtitle: Spring Boot Starters & Scaffolding
cubo.description: Cubo Starter (L2) defines "How to start a Zeka project". It is a collection of opinionated Spring Boot Starters that integrate best-in-class open source components with Zeka's standards. It provides out-of-the-box support for database, logging, API documentation, and messaging.

mybatis.title: cubo-mybatis-spring-boot
mybatis.desc: MyBatis Plus integration with unified config, pagination, and code generation support.

rest.title: cubo-rest-spring-boot
rest.desc: Standardized REST API support, including global response wrapping and error handling.

logsystem.title: cubo-logsystem-spring-boot
logsystem.desc: Structured logging, audit logs, and trace ID injection.

messaging.title: cubo-messaging-spring-boot
messaging.desc: Abstraction for message queues (RocketMQ/Kafka) with unified event publishing.

launcher.title: cubo-launcher-spring-boot
launcher.desc: The entry point starter. Handles environment setup, banner, and graceful shutdown.

eiko.title: Eiko Orch
eiko.subtitle: Middleware orchestration
eiko.description: Unified encapsulation for APM, Cache, Nacos, and Scheduling.

felo.title: Felo Space
felo.subtitle: Business Applications
felo.description: Real-world examples like E-commerce and Payment systems.

engine.heroDescription: Unified AI service orchestration layer. Connecting IDE to infinite intelligence, providing standardized neural power for Zeka family plugins.
engine.matrixDesc: Shield model differences, achieve deep decoupling and efficient collaboration between business plugins and AI capabilities.
engine.providersTitle: Connect to 80+ Mainstream AI Service Providers
engine.providersDesc: Whether cloud giants or local private models, Engine provides native-level support. Break vendor lock-in, switch freely to the strongest models with one click.
engine.openaiCardDesc: Perfect support for all providers compatible with OpenAI interface specification, from DeepSeek to Moonshot, seamless one-click access.
engine.anthropicCardDesc: Deeply adapted to Claude series models, supporting unique Prompt Caching and ultra-long context vision capabilities.
engine.localCardDesc: Data never leaves the domain. Seamlessly connect to local inference engines to build an extremely secure, zero-latency internal coding environment.
engine.unifiedApiDesc: Standardized abstraction layer, allowing plugin developers to ignore underlying model differences.
engine.secureVaultDesc: API Key encrypted storage in IntelliJ Password Safe, eliminating leaks.
engine.streamRoutingDesc: Support SSE streaming and automatic degradation routing to ensure high service availability.
engine.contextMgmtDesc: Intelligent context window management, automatic Prompt compression, maximize Token utilization.
engine.configDesc: Intuitive configuration panel supporting custom API Endpoint, model parameters, and connection testing.

javadoc.heroDescription: AI automatically generates standard Java documentation. One-click completion, keeping code and documentation in sync.
javadoc.stripDesc1: Deep understanding of code logic and intent
javadoc.stripDesc2: Follow Java conventions and best practices
javadoc.demoDesc: Automatically generates complete documentation comments based on method signatures and code logic
javadoc.providerDesc: Choose your preferred AI service, or use local models for privacy
javadoc.section2Desc: Traditional tools just fill in @param tags. Zeka analyzes your logic, branches, and exceptions to write meaningful, human-readable explanations.
javadoc.section3Desc: Whether you follow Google Java Style or need bilingual documentation for international teams, we handle the formatting.
javadoc.card1Desc: Generate English for open source, or Chinese for internal teams. Or both.
javadoc.card2Desc: Strict adherence to HTML4/5 Javadoc standards and Checkstyle rules.
javadoc.card3Desc: Customize every tag and description format using Velocity templates.
javadoc.privacyDesc: Documentation often reveals core business logic. With Local Mode (Ollama), your code never leaves your machine.

changelog.heroDescription: No more copy-pasting from git log. Automatically generate structured changelogs, daily reports, and smart commit messages using AI.
changelog.feature1Desc: Summarize your work for stand-ups instantly.
changelog.feature2Desc: Group commits by feature, fix, or refactor automatically.
changelog.feature3Desc: Let AI write your commit messages based on staged diffs.
changelog.section2Desc: Stop staring at empty commit boxes. The AI analyzes your staged changes and generates concise, descriptive messages following Conventional Commits standards.
changelog.section3Desc: Whether you need a simple bulleted list for Slack or a complex Markdown table for Jira, our template engine has you covered.
changelog.template1Desc: Concise bullet points focusing on "What changed". Perfect for daily standups.
changelog.template2Desc: Categorized by type (Features, Fixes) with links to issues. Professional and clean.
changelog.template3Desc: Full control with Freemarker templates. Access commit hash, author, date, and more.
changelog.ctaDesc: Join thousands of developers who have stopped writing manual reports and started coding more.

terminal.heroDescription: Transform natural language into Shell commands instantly. AI-powered terminal assistant for developers.
terminal.typePlaceholder: Describe your command in plain language...
terminal.suggestion1: Find all Java files modified in last 7 days
terminal.suggestion3: Compress all log files into archive
terminal.feature1Desc: Describe what you want in plain English, AI generates accurate shell commands
terminal.feature2Desc: Support Bash, Zsh, PowerShell and other mainstream shells
terminal.feature3Desc: Warn before executing destructive operations like rm and format
terminal.feature4Desc: AI learns from your usage patterns and provides increasingly accurate suggestions
terminal.ctaDesc: No need to memorize complex commands. Let AI be your terminal expert.

hero.tagline1: Transform natural language into Shell commands instantly.
hero.tagline2: AI-powered, deeply integrated into your IDE terminal.
hero.tagline3: Just type your description and press TAB to generate.

terminal.section2Desc: It doesn't just execute commands; it understands your project. Ask about your files, git status, or build dependencies.
terminal.section3Desc: Never run a destructive command by accident again. The AI detects dangerous operations and asks for explicit confirmation.
terminal.safetyCard2Desc: Explains what a complex command will do.
terminal.safetyCard3Desc: Works with Bash, Zsh, PowerShell, Fish.

repairer.feature1Desc: Automatically identify Checkstyle violations including naming, formatting, and documentation issues
repairer.feature2Desc: Targeted fixes without affecting unrelated code, preserving logic integrity
repairer.feature3Desc: Fix multiple files at once, dramatically improving refactoring efficiency

repairer.section2Desc: Repairer doesn't just reformat; it understands. It handles complex naming refactors and logic-preserving fixes that traditional linters miss.
repairer.section3Desc: Sync your organization's Checkstyle or PMD rules. Repairer ensures every developer commits clean, standardized code automatically.

swagger.heroDescription: Generate Swagger/OpenAPI documentation directly from Java code. Built-in modern debugger turns IDEA into Postman, API development has never been smoother.
swagger.feature1Desc: Directly parse JavaDoc and Controller code logic. No need to add tedious @Operation or @Api annotations, keep code pure.
swagger.feature2Desc: One-click switch between Dev/Test/Prod environment variables. Auto-sync Authorization Header, say goodbye to manual Token copying.
swagger.feature3Desc: Perfect support for OpenAPI 3.0 and Swagger 2.0 standards. Export to Markdown, HTML or Postman Collection.
swagger.configHint: Configured via simple annotations if needed
swagger.section2Desc: Maintain a clean codebase. Our engine parses your source code and Javadoc to build accurate API specs without cluttering your logic with decorators.
swagger.section3Desc: Test your endpoints without leaving the IDE. Support for OAuth2, environment variables, and automatic request body generation from DTOs.
